title: helichrysum geayi
intro: Helichrysum geayi is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow blooms and aromatic foliage. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum geayi include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum geayi can be made into essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
